title: rubus rupifragus
intro: Rubus rupifragus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in treating various health issues, including digestive problems and fever. The health benefits of Rubus rupifragus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus rupifragus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
